articles.title: Cardano’s $ADA Tumbles Harder Than Market Leaders – What’s Really Going On?
articles.description: Cardano’s $ADA is today performing the worst among the 15 biggest cryptocurrencies by market capitalization. In the last 24 hours, $ADA has shed 4% of its value. At its current price of $0.3162, $ADA is now about 10% lower than it was this time last week. This makes for some of the stiffest intra-week losses […]

articles.title: Bitcoin Price Reacts to US Jobs Report and Declining Unemployment Rate
articles.description: The unemployment rate dropped from the multi-year peak of 4.3% in July to 4.2% in August.

articles.title: Is This Why Bitcoin’s Price Continues to Decline?
articles.description: The demand from US investors seems to have disappeared in the past week or so.

articles.title: Ripple Seeks Delay on $125M Fine in SEC Legal Battle
articles.description: Ripple has requested a delay on its $125M fine as its legal battle with the SEC continues, potentially impacting the future of XRP and crypto regulations.

articles.title: Attack of The Bears: Analysts Paint Bleak Short-Term Bitcoin Price Predictions
articles.description: As Bitcoin prices continue to retreat, analysts are becoming increasingly bearish with their predictions for short-term market action.
